title: Shinjis Interface Headset
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's Interface Headset [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Aug 27, 2009 6:12 pm ...wearing those Nerve Connector things on his noggin when he was giving Zeruel a beatdown? I was watching the fight when I noticed that the cuts used never showed him wearing them. Was it just the camrip, or something no one felt like mentioning?

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Thu Aug 27, 2009 9:11 pm If it's not there, it's either the cam rip, or all it does is boost your sync rate like the plug suit.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Aug 27, 2009 9:13 pm Well he was actually wearing them in episode 20 compared to EoE where he's not wearing them at all. Checking the camrip, I didn't see them at all:

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Thu Aug 27, 2009 11:04 pm Then that's a msytery then.Doesnt wearing a plugsuit and those neuron clip on's help you synch with the Eva?How was he able to start Unit 01 with neither?Eva has so many mysteries that it isnt funny.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Thu Aug 27, 2009 11:37 pm I just remembered the thing they did in the series, they tried to sync with the evas without anything - butt naked. It can be related to this one.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Aug 27, 2009 11:41 pm Eva 04 wrote: Then that's a mystery then.Doesn't wearing a plugsuit and those neuron clip on's help you synch with the Eva?How was he able to start Unit 01 with neither?Eva has so many mysteries that it isnt funny.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:23 am Having a plugsuit/the interface headset on can supposedly help with synching, but EoE/2.0 show it's not required.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Aug 28, 2009 2:21 pm Actually, EoE showed nothing of the sort. Shinji had *no* control of Eva-01's actions. He wasn't even synched, or he would have had some reaction during the whole crucifixion scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 28, 2009 4:57 pm Good point, I wasn't thinking about that part when typing up my reply. It's similar to how either Asuka how no control of Eva-02 during her final battle, or it was shared control with her Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by requiemvalorum » Fri Aug 28, 2009 6:31 pm Legendary wrote: Actually, EoE showed nothing of the sort. Shinji had *no* control of Eva-01's actions. He wasn't even synched, or he would have had some reaction during the whole crucifixion scene.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:22 pm requiemvalorum wrote: Legendary wrote: Actually, EoE showed nothing of the sort. Shinji had *no* control of Eva-01's actions. He wasn't even synched, or he would have had some reaction during the whole crucifixion scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 28, 2009 11:31 pm trueno_twentyone wrote: Off-the-record: I am loving your avatars, Legendary and SSD. Where the heck you got that?

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Sat Aug 29, 2009 1:50 am That thread is ridiculously difficult to sort through. But I found it.

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Mon Aug 31, 2009 12:02 pm i always felt the headset could enhance synchronization, but it wasn't entirely necessary, much like the plugsuit. special gear makes synching easier, much like mari's second plugsuit had a lot to do with the "beast mode." of course, that could just be me relating plugsuit and headset when in reality there's no connection between them, but that's the feeling i got. so if rebuild!Shinji was already synching pretty high with his eva (was that screenshot before or after it goes berserker? i'd have to rewatch) , the spiritual connection is more than enough to synch with the eva than any actual neural connection so the headset wouldn't be required? *speculates like whoa*

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Aug 31, 2009 7:10 pm So would this mean that it could be possible to initiate beast mode without the suit? I mean like it seemed almost like the suit was protecting Mari from something, though whatever it was, it was still getting through......

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Aug 31, 2009 8:56 pm FUCKING AWESOME! And one of the best parts of the movie, next to Shinji berserking and actually somewhat growing a pair for once in the end.

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Tue Sep 01, 2009 10:21 am @wonderluster-- actually, i don't know. i didn't get that impression, actually. to me it felt beast mode was all about the suit, but it was mostly because the beast mode implied so many physical changes in eva 02, so to me that kind of implied they needed a hardware change (the nifty plugsuit) to go with the software change (the animalistic attitude). that is, she could perhaps make the eva animalistic even without the plugsuit, if we accept that the synching itself doesn't depend on the suit but is just enhanced by it (of course, this is assuming mari can get that high a synch rate with the eva, depending on which soul is within the eva or IF there's a soul in it)... but would it be called a true beast mode or not i'm not sure, because beast mode implies the release of those control thingies and for that, uh, well you need the right equipment. or at least it seemed that way to me. i guess it's all a matter of interpretation until ( if ) TPTB finally decide to reveal the mystery behind the funky new eva mode.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Sep 01, 2009 10:18 pm I don't know if its been mentioned earlier, but is there any relation between the pylons that come out in Beast Mode, and the pylons in the back of Jet Alone? I don't have an image, but they really are similar...

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Tue Sep 01, 2009 10:33 pm Both are types of Control Robs. Limiters. One to control heat and radiation on Jet Alone the other to hold back Evas full potential. So yeah......Anno likes rods....Kinda weird..

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Sep 01, 2009 11:01 pm In before Freud.

[]: Shinji's Interface Headset [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Aug 27, 2009 6:12 pm ...wearing those Nerve Connector things on his noggin when he was giving Zeruel a beatdown? I was watching the fight when I noticed that the cuts used never showed him wearing them. Was it just the camrip, or something no one felt like mentioning?

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan &ra
